name: gpu_vram_write
title: GPU memory write bandwidth
short_description: Write bandwidth to the graphics processor's own memory.

structured_text.description: Writes large buffers into the graphics processor's local memory with a write only pattern, using a working set far larger than any on chip cache. The result shows how fast the GPU can store results back to its own memory.
structured_text.metric_explanation: Bandwidth is the number of bytes written to GPU memory per second, reported in GB/s.
structured_text.value_interpretation: Higher is better. Write bandwidth limits workloads that produce large outputs in GPU memory, such as render targets and generated activations.
structured_text.reasoning: Writing can behave differently from reading on a GPU memory system, so a dedicated write test captures output heavy accelerated work.

domain_gaming.explanation: Writing render targets and frame buffers each frame uses GPU write bandwidth.

domain_office.explanation: Office work writes little data through GPU memory.

domain_software_development.explanation: Mostly relevant when developing GPU accelerated software.

domain_graphics_design.explanation: Producing edited image buffers writes large data into GPU memory.

domain_video_editing.explanation: Writing processed frames into GPU memory uses write bandwidth.

domain_3d_rendering.explanation: Writing render buffers and intermediate results is write bandwidth bound.

domain_audio_production.explanation: Audio work writes little through GPU memory.

domain_cad_engineering.explanation: Writing viewport buffers and results uses GPU write bandwidth.

domain_scientific_computing.explanation: Writing large result arrays makes accelerated simulations write bandwidth bound.

domain_ai_training.explanation: Writing activations and gradients consumes large amounts of write bandwidth.

domain_ai_inference.explanation: Writing intermediate activations during inference uses write bandwidth.

domain_data_science.explanation: Materialising results in GPU memory writes large data.

domain_server_virt.explanation: Shared GPU servers divide write bandwidth across many tenants.
